title: Daylight v20 Pinned Cryptographic Attestation
description: Documentation schema for one pinned attestation inside an external evidence bundle. The enforced validator is src/external_evidence.py. An attestation is rejected if the signer identity contains a reserved token, the independence class is not 'external', it is fixture or not claim-usable, its signature algorithm is not ed25519, its public key digest is not pinned in daylight/v20-aperture-singularity/pinned/external-verification-material.v20.json, its statement digest does not recompute (SHA-256 over b'DAYLIGHT-v20-PINNED-ATTESTATION-STATEMENT:' + canonical(attestation without statement_digest and signature)), its subject digest does not match the referenced evidence item, its verification material ref is not the pinned registry path, or its raw 64-byte Ed25519 signature fails local deterministic verification against the pinned raw 32-byte public key.
